description_long: This is a robust, square storage box constructed from weathered wooden planks, reinforced at the corners with visible metal fasteners. The wood has a mottled, olive-brown finish, giving it a rugged, utilitarian appearance suitable for outdoor or industrial urban environments. The front face features a rectangular, slightly recessed panel that may serve as a label area, distinguishing it from the other sides. The box sits on four short feet, elevating it slightly above the ground, which helps protect its base from moisture or dirt. The top appears to be a solid, flat surface, likely serving as a removable or liftable lid, though no hinges or handles are visible. Overall, the box is designed for durability and practicality, ideal for storing tools, equipment, or supplies in garages, workshops, or alleyways.
description: A sturdy, weathered wooden storage box with metal-reinforced corners and a recessed label panel on the front, ideal for urban or industrial use.
description_view_0: Front view showing a recessed rectangular label panel and metal corner fasteners.
description_view_1: Side view with vertical wooden planks and metal corner fasteners, no label panel visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the side, with vertical planks and no distinguishing features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, matching the other plain sides with vertical planks and metal fasteners.
